race.description: Winsec Savings & Loans Wangaratta Cup Handicap
race.comment: The big one of the day and you suspect it's been the target all prep for MAKE IT SWEET (8), who is trained on the track. The three runs leading in have been good, particularly two back at Caulfield, and he'll be better for the run at 2000m last start. Drawing the inside is just an added bonus. WYMARK (4) was a good winner at Caulfield three back then was tested in much tougher Qld races at his past two and was far from disgraced. He'll find this much more to his liking but fared terribly at the draw. NEW YORK HURRICANE (9) has been building fitness this prep and was only narrowly beaten in the Camperdown Cup, when he finished strongly. Kept up to mark with a recent Echuca trial, which he won nicely. NEWLOOK (3) is one of a few imports who showed some encouraging signs in the debut Aussie prep and has trialled well ahead of the return. GREGOLIMO (7) ran an improved race last start but did have every chance. Just need to see him put a race away.
